description:
Add per-phase skip conditions that are evaluated before phase execution. If any guard matches, the phase is marked Skipped and the workflow advances to the next phase.

Changes needed:
1. Add skip_if: Vec<String> to WorkflowPhaseConfig in workflow_config.rs
2. Add simple expression evaluator for guards. Expressions operate on typed task context fields:
   - task_type == 'docs' | task_type == 'chore' | task_type == 'experiment'
   - impact_area not contains 'Frontend'
   - phase_capability.writes_files == false
3. Evaluate skip_if guards in lifecycle_executor.rs before entering RunPhase state
4. When skip fires: set phase status to Skipped, record WorkflowDecisionAction::Skip with reason, advance to next
5. Add WorkflowPhaseStatus::Skipped handling in daemon_phase_pool.rs (already exists but unused)
6. Add tests: skip based on task_type, skip based on impact_area, no skip when guard doesn't match

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow_config.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/types.rs (WorkflowPhaseStatus::Skipped already exists)
title: Add skip_if guard conditions to workflow phase execution
